CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Address__Street__s)), Address__Street__s & ", ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Address__City__s)), Address__City__s & ", ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Address__StateCode__s))), TEXT(Address__StateCode__s) & " ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Address__PostalCode__s)), Address__PostalCode__s & ", ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Address__CountryCode__s))), TEXT(Address__CountryCode__s), "")
CustomField.label: Full Address
